questionHtml:
A ball of mass 1.5 kg strikes a force sensor and bounces. The ball experiences a change in velocity of 10 m s−1. The graph shows the variation with time t of the force F recorded by the sensor.

 

What is ΔT?


A.  0.15 s

B.  0.30 s

C.  0.60 s

D.  3.0 s
